reason: Down-on-his-luck salesmen face crushing quotas and betrayal, yet cling to integrity in harsh corporate halls.
One juror stands alone against false guilt, battling prejudice in a cramped, tense jury room.
An inspiring teacher fights rigid tradition to ignite hope in an oppressive boarding-school system.
An inmate’s clever revolt sparks slow-burn justice against a dehumanizing prison bureaucracy.
A lone idealist exposes political greed on the Senate floor in an intimate, heartrending stand.
A village band together to protect their tiny home from a faceless oil-company power play.
Two inner-city teens chase basketball dreams amid systemic neglect and fierce rivalries.
Teens resist brutal clique politics in a savage high-school microcosm, blending rage with resilience.
A lawyer battles AIDS discrimination in court, confronting a rigid system with personal courage.
A nun defends a condemned inmate with unwavering belief, challenging a death-penalty system.
